title: Cuba acknowledges secret meetings with U.S. as Trump dials up threats
summary_full: Trump has warned that Cuba is next in line after Venezuela and Iran, saying that the Havana regime is in its “last moments of life.”
summary_public: Trump has warned that Cuba is next in line after Venezuela and Iran, saying that the Havana regime is in its “last moments of life.”

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Cuba is next in line after Venezuela and Iran
